authority: The engine and executable guards determine admission. V40 is the complete Cartesian paired-state fixed-point continuation of the admitted V38 parent and V39 causal child lineage.

composition.lineage: The admitted V38 parent emission and its admitted V39 causal child form the complete binary lineage.
composition.paired_update: Every active residue scans all 24x24=576 joint phi/psi states.
composition.chain_direction: The registered peptide builder advances through increasing residue indices from N to C.
composition.convergence: Both lineage seeds descend under the unchanged admitted V3 total order until a complete sweep changes zero states.
composition.reconciliation: The complete fixed-point set is reconciled under that same total order.

required_derivation_guards.dependency_trace_to_the_One_or_an_engine: The binary lineage, 24-count angle axis, complete 576-state paired lattice, positive N-to-C direction, V3 target-free order and peptide builder are already admitted and source-bound.
required_derivation_guards.generated_complete_candidate_space: V40 crosses both parent-child lineage seeds with every one of the 576 paired states at every active residue.
required_derivation_guards.assembled_form_minimality: Neither the binary lineage nor one paired lattice equals their complete crossed update space of 1152.
required_derivation_guards.named_shape_uniqueness: Among one-operation +,-,*,/ forms over 2 and 576, only multiplication reaches 1152.
required_derivation_guards.measured_provenance_excluded_from_deriva: The lineage is admitted by parent-child provenance, not by either parent's post-seal TM or dRMSD measurement.
required_derivation_guards.engine_halt_on_violation: Ernos and Python guards halt on lineage identity, counts, candidate coverage, causal direction, strict descent, fixed-point, source, configuration or seal drift.
required_derivation_guards.purpose_matched_real_execution: Required before promotion and recorded separately by the sealed ubiquitin L76 cumulative development benchmark.
